description.en: Top-tier generalist model with excellent reasoning depth, strong coding reliability, and mature agent tooling support.
description.zh-TW: 頂級全能模型，具備出色的推理深度、穩定的程式能力，以及成熟的 agent 工具鏈支援。

strengths.en: Very strong long-horizon task execution
strengths.zh-TW: 長流程任務執行能力非常強

strengths.en: Deep ecosystem integration across tools and APIs
strengths.zh-TW: 工具與 API 生態整合成熟

caveats.en: Premium pricing for heavy batch usage
caveats.zh-TW: 大量批次使用時成本偏高

caveats.en: Fast enough, but not the cheapest latency pick
caveats.zh-TW: 速度夠用，但不是最低延遲與最低成本選擇

summary.en: Top-tier generalist model with excellent reasoning depth, strong coding reliability, and mature agent tooling support.
summary.zh-TW: 頂級全能模型，具備出色的推理深度、穩定的程式能力，以及成熟的 agent 工具鏈支援。

description.en: Lean, affordable OpenAI model tuned for responsive assistants, classification, and operational agent tasks.
description.zh-TW: 輕量且價格友善的 OpenAI 模型，適合即時助理、分類與日常 agent 任務。

strengths.en: Excellent throughput-per-dollar
strengths.zh-TW: 單位成本產出效率很高

strengths.en: Strong tool-calling ergonomics
strengths.zh-TW: 工具呼叫體驗成熟穩定

caveats.en: Less depth for frontier-grade reasoning
caveats.zh-TW: 面對最前沿推理任務時深度較不足

caveats.en: May need stronger prompt scaffolding for nuanced analysis
caveats.zh-TW: 做細緻分析時需要更好的提示框架

summary.en: Lean, affordable OpenAI model tuned for responsive assistants, classification, and operational agent tasks.
summary.zh-TW: 輕量且價格友善的 OpenAI 模型，適合即時助理、分類與日常 agent 任務。

description.en: Highly trusted reasoning and coding model with exceptional writing quality and calm, consistent outputs.
description.zh-TW: 高信任度的推理與程式模型，寫作品質優秀，輸出穩定且一致性高。

strengths.en: Excellent code edits and technical explanations
strengths.zh-TW: 程式修改與技術解說能力出色

strengths.en: Strong output consistency for editorial workflows
strengths.zh-TW: 在編輯與寫作流程中穩定度高

caveats.en: Tool ecosystem is strong but narrower than the broadest platform stacks
caveats.zh-TW: 工具生態不錯，但仍略窄於最完整的平台型生態

caveats.en: Latency can rise on very long deliberative prompts
caveats.zh-TW: 超長推理提示下延遲可能上升

summary.en: Highly trusted reasoning and coding model with exceptional writing quality and calm, consistent outputs.
summary.zh-TW: 高信任度的推理與程式模型，寫作品質優秀，輸出穩定且一致性高。

description.en: Fast and lightweight model ideal for summarization, routing, support tasks, and budget-sensitive assistants.
description.zh-TW: 快速輕量模型，適合摘要、任務路由、客服與成本敏感型助理。

strengths.en: Responsive and economical for high-volume operations
strengths.zh-TW: 高量操作下反應快且成本低

strengths.en: Strong default tone quality for concise outputs
strengths.zh-TW: 簡潔輸出時語氣表現穩定

caveats.en: Limited ceiling for complex multi-step planning
caveats.zh-TW: 複雜多步驟規劃能力上限有限

caveats.en: Less appealing for agent workflows that require richer tool state
caveats.zh-TW: 需要更複雜工具狀態的 agent 流程較不適合

summary.en: Fast and lightweight model ideal for summarization, routing, support tasks, and budget-sensitive assistants.
summary.zh-TW: 快速輕量模型，適合摘要、任務路由、客服與成本敏感型助理。

description.en: Powerful multimodal model with strong long-context analysis, research workflows, and broad document understanding.
description.zh-TW: 強大的多模態模型，擅長長上下文分析、研究流程與複雜文件理解。

strengths.en: Outstanding large-document synthesis
strengths.zh-TW: 大型文件整合與歸納能力突出

strengths.en: One of the best multimodal coverage profiles
strengths.zh-TW: 多模態覆蓋面非常完整

caveats.en: UX across endpoints can feel less uniform than the most polished competitors
caveats.zh-TW: 不同端點體驗的一致性略遜於最成熟對手

caveats.en: Not always the fastest interactive pick
caveats.zh-TW: 互動式回應未必是最快選擇

summary.en: Powerful multimodal model with strong long-context analysis, research workflows, and broad document understanding.
summary.zh-TW: 強大的多模態模型，擅長長上下文分析、研究流程與複雜文件理解。

description.en: Low-latency multimodal workhorse for assistant surfaces, routing layers, and lightweight agent execution.
description.zh-TW: 低延遲多模態工作馬，適合助理介面、路由層與輕量 agent 執行。

strengths.en: Excellent latency for multimodal interfaces
strengths.zh-TW: 多模態介面的延遲表現很優秀

strengths.en: Very compelling value for large-scale ingestion
strengths.zh-TW: 大規模資料吞吐時成本效益佳

caveats.en: Reasoning depth trails premium frontier models
caveats.zh-TW: 推理深度仍落後旗艦級模型

caveats.en: May need a higher-tier fallback for sensitive outputs
caveats.zh-TW: 高敏感輸出情境可能需要更高階備援模型

summary.en: Low-latency multimodal workhorse for assistant surfaces, routing layers, and lightweight agent execution.
summary.zh-TW: 低延遲多模態工作馬，適合助理介面、路由層與輕量 agent 執行。

description.en: Strong real-time orientation and increasingly capable reasoning model with distinctive web freshness advantages.
description.zh-TW: 偏向即時資訊場景、推理能力持續增強，且具備新鮮網路資訊優勢的模型。

strengths.en: Useful when freshness matters
strengths.zh-TW: 重視資訊新鮮度時很有價值

strengths.en: Confident long-form synthesis style
strengths.zh-TW: 長文整合輸出風格有辨識度

caveats.en: Ecosystem and enterprise controls still maturing
caveats.zh-TW: 生態與企業級控制面仍在成熟中

caveats.en: Less proven for complex agent loops
caveats.zh-TW: 複雜 agent loop 的實戰驗證較少

summary.en: Strong real-time orientation and increasingly capable reasoning model with distinctive web freshness advantages.
summary.zh-TW: 偏向即時資訊場景、推理能力持續增強，且具備新鮮網路資訊優勢的模型。

description.en: High-value reasoning model that punches above its price tier for technical problem solving and analytical depth.
description.zh-TW: 高性價比推理模型，在技術解題與分析深度上常有超出價格帶的表現。

strengths.en: Very attractive for reasoning-heavy workloads on a budget
strengths.zh-TW: 預算有限時做重推理任務非常划算

strengths.en: Strong analytical style for math and code
strengths.zh-TW: 在數學與程式分析上表現強勢

caveats.en: Latency and ecosystem maturity remain trade-offs
caveats.zh-TW: 延遲與生態成熟度仍是代價

caveats.en: Operational guarantees vary by deployment path
caveats.zh-TW: 不同部署路徑下的穩定性保證不一

summary.en: High-value reasoning model that punches above its price tier for technical problem solving and analytical depth.
summary.zh-TW: 高性價比推理模型，在技術解題與分析深度上常有超出價格帶的表現。

description.en: Flexible open-weight option with broad community experimentation and strong customization potential.
description.zh-TW: 彈性高的開放權重模型，社群實驗豐富，客製化潛力強。

pricing.notes: Depends on infra and serving path.

strengths.en: Strong fit for teams that need control and self-hosting
strengths.zh-TW: 需要掌控權與自架的團隊會很適合

strengths.en: Community momentum creates many integration paths
strengths.zh-TW: 社群動能帶來豐富整合方式

caveats.en: Production quality depends heavily on deployment discipline
caveats.zh-TW: 正式環境品質非常依賴部署水準

caveats.en: Benchmark strength does not always translate to polished UX
caveats.zh-TW: benchmark 成績不一定等於實際體驗成熟

summary.en: Flexible open-weight option with broad community experimentation and strong customization potential.
summary.zh-TW: 彈性高的開放權重模型，社群實驗豐富，客製化潛力強。

description.en: Ambitious frontier contender with strong multilingual performance and good enterprise utility across Asian markets.
description.zh-TW: 具競爭力的前沿模型，在多語言尤其亞洲市場企業場景中有不錯表現。

strengths.en: Strong multilingual coverage and pragmatic enterprise fit
strengths.zh-TW: 多語能力強，企業落地實用度高

strengths.en: Balanced performance profile without extreme weaknesses
strengths.zh-TW: 整體表現均衡，沒有明顯短板

caveats.en: Global ecosystem mindshare is still catching up
caveats.zh-TW: 全球生態心智仍在追趕中

caveats.en: Docs and examples can vary by region
caveats.zh-TW: 文件與案例完整度因地區而異

summary.en: Ambitious frontier contender with strong multilingual performance and good enterprise utility across Asian markets.
summary.zh-TW: 具競爭力的前沿模型，在多語言尤其亞洲市場企業場景中有不錯表現。

description.en: European flagship model with solid reasoning, concise style, and attractive deployment flexibility.
description.zh-TW: 歐洲旗艦模型，具備紮實推理、精簡風格與靈活部署優勢。

strengths.en: Clean enterprise-friendly posture and deployment options
strengths.zh-TW: 企業友善姿態與部署選項清楚

strengths.en: Good balance between cost and reasoning quality
strengths.zh-TW: 成本與推理品質之間取得不錯平衡

caveats.en: Ecosystem is smaller than the hyperscaler leaders
caveats.zh-TW: 生態規模仍小於超大平台領先者

caveats.en: Less differentiated for multimodal-heavy product surfaces
caveats.zh-TW: 對多模態產品面來說差異化較少

summary.en: European flagship model with solid reasoning, concise style, and attractive deployment flexibility.
summary.zh-TW: 歐洲旗艦模型，具備紮實推理、精簡風格與靈活部署優勢。

description.en: Enterprise-oriented model with strong retrieval posture, business language handling, and dependable workflow integration.
description.zh-TW: 偏企業導向的模型，適合檢索增強、商務語言處理與穩定工作流整合。

strengths.en: Strong fit for internal knowledge workflows
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合內部知識工作流

strengths.en: Dependable enterprise integration story
strengths.zh-TW: 企業整合敘事穩定可信

caveats.en: Less mindshare in cutting-edge coding circles
caveats.zh-TW: 在最前沿 coding 圈中的心智較弱

caveats.en: Not the most exciting pick for multimodal experiences
caveats.zh-TW: 多模態體驗不是它的主打強項

summary.en: Enterprise-oriented model with strong retrieval posture, business language handling, and dependable workflow integration.
summary.zh-TW: 偏企業導向的模型，適合檢索增強、商務語言處理與穩定工作流整合。

description.en: Research-first model experience optimized for answer grounding, current web synthesis, and citation-friendly output.
description.zh-TW: 偏研究導向的模型體驗，強調有根據的答案、即時網頁整合與引用友善輸出。

strengths.en: Great for research UX with source visibility
strengths.zh-TW: 研究型體驗下可見來源這點很有優勢

strengths.en: Useful for analyst workflows that need current context
strengths.zh-TW: 需要即時背景的分析流程相當適合

caveats.en: Not a primary choice for tool-heavy coding agents
caveats.zh-TW: 不適合做工具密集的 coding agent 主力

caveats.en: Less control than fully orchestrated platform APIs
caveats.zh-TW: 相比完整平台 API，可控性較低

summary.en: Research-first model experience optimized for answer grounding, current web synthesis, and citation-friendly output.
summary.zh-TW: 偏研究導向的模型體驗，強調有根據的答案、即時網頁整合與引用友善輸出。
